modmenu.descriptionTranslation.declinabl:
Inflects killer mob names in death messages for languages with grammatical cases.
Supports custom declensions (case marking) through resource pack translation keys.
declinable-death-messages.config.title: Declinable Death Messages Config
declinable-death-messages.config.names.t:
Use keys of the form '[death message].by.[name]' to decline player names and renamed entity names.
Disable this if your resource pack or a server resource pack abuses this feature.
Additionally, you can enable advanced tooltips (%s + %s) to display the killer's original name when hovering over their name.
Additionally, with advanced tooltips enabled, you can hover over the killer's name to see their original name.
